title: 1. SiHuaZhong 四花中 (77.09) and SiHuaWai 四花副 (77.14) with pricking method to induc
text:
bring a fairly good effect. 四花中、副，点刺放出㋿黑色血。
Precordial pain and pain on both sides of heart could be treated by puncturing TongGuan, TongShan and TongTian.
SiHuaZhong and SiHuaWai with pricking method to induce bleeding will bring a fairly good effect too. NeiGuan
and ZuSanLi also work well. For severe condition, pricking method should be applied.
